mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_document (user_id, document_name, source_path, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{documentName}, #{sourcePath}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT document_id, user_id, document_name, source_path, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_document WHERE document_id = #{documentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT document_id, user_id, document_name, source_path, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_document WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
